# Hidden cost reveal

## When to use

Use for unaware/problem-aware buyers.

## Why it works

Makes the cost of current behavior visible.

## Mechanism

Loss aversion and operational pain create attention.

## Required inputs

Calculator, before/after, cost-of-manual-work page.

## When not to use

If hidden cost is speculative.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Calculator starts, shares, CTA clicks.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
